lean_declaration:
theorem parts_sum_eq_n (n : ℕ) (p : Nat.Partition n) : p.parts.sum = n :=
  p.parts_sum
notes: Uses the parts_sum field from the Nat.Partition structure; n is ℕ not ℤ because Mathlib's partition type uses ℕ.
This directly formalizes definition (c): a partition of n has its parts summing to n.
